title: fix_pipeline_next_decide_approach_response
description: Response schema for the fix_pipeline_next_decide_approach agent that classifies pipeline failures and decides the approach for fixing a pipeline.

failure_category.description: The category of the pipeline failure. Use the most specific category that fits.

suggested_fix_type.description: The suggested type of fix for the pipeline failure.

decision.description: Use 'create_plan' when confident a fix can be created. Use 'add_comment' when not confident or unable to create a fix.
